title: Sensationsprozess Casilla
writer: Hans Mahner-Mons, Ernst von Salomon, Eduard von Borsody
actors: Heinrich George, Jutta Freybe, Albert Hehn
plot: Peter Roland wanted for kidnapping and murder meets star advocate Caesar J. Vandergrift during a flight that he manages to a secure landing . In turn Vandergrift promises to take over his case during Peters trial in New York.
